title: DALeveling - Solo Leveling Mod
description: Inspired by Solo Leveling, this mod brings an immersive, animated health bar to Minecraft, replacing the vanilla HUD with a clean RPG-style interface.
body:
- Next update in March for design and dungeon + portals

# Become the Shadow Monarch. Level up, allocate stats, extract shadows from fallen enemies, and unleash them with ARISE.

Core Systems

Every mob you kill grants XP based on its max health. When you level up, you receive 5 stat points to distribute freely and your mana is fully restored. Your rank progresses from E through D, C, B, A, and finally S-Rank at level 75. Earn titles as you accumulate kills: Apprentice, Slayer, Hunter, Shadow Knight, Shadow Lord, and ultimately Shadow Monarch at 1,000 kills.

5 Stats

STR increases attack damage (+0.5/pt). Unlocks Berserker Mode at 5 — when your HP drops below 25%, your damage doubles automatically. AGI increases movement speed (+0.004/pt). Unlocks Double Jump at 5 (costs 5 mana) and Stealth at 10. VIT increases max health (+1 HP per point). INT increases max mana (+10/pt) and mana regeneration rate. Unlocks Mana Shield at 5. LUK increases Minecraft's luck attribute, grants a LUK% chance for critical hits, boosts XP gain by 2% per point, and increases shadow extraction chance.

Shadow Army — ARISE

When you kill a mob, there is a chance (10% + LUK×2) to extract its shadow. Stored shadows can be summoned as tamed shadow wolves that fight alongside you. Their HP, damage, and speed scale with your level, STR, AGI, and Shadow Power upgrades. Shadows glow with a dark aura and are immune to fire. You can store them back at any time.

Abilities

Dash propels you forward at high speed, boosted by AGI and the Dash Power upgrade. Mana Shield absorbs incoming damage using your mana (2 mana per 1 HP absorbed). Stealth grants invisibility that drains 3 mana per second — your first attack from stealth deals triple damage as a Backstab. Berserker Mode passively doubles your damage when your health is critical. Intimidation Aura slows all nearby mobs when you reach level 10, with the radius and potency scaling with your level. Double Jump lets you jump again mid-air for 5 mana.

Shadow Shop

Killing mobs earns Souls, a currency used in the Shadow Shop. Eight upgrades are available, each with 10 levels: Shadow Power (+15% shadow HP/damage per level), Shadow Slots (+1 max shadow), Mana Regen (+1 mana per tick), XP Boost (+5% XP), Dash Power (+15% dash speed), Life Steal (+3% HP on hit), Soul Harvest (+10% soul drops), and Crit Damage (+20% crit multiplier).

Auto-Loot

All drops from mobs you kill are automatically collected into a personal loot inventory (27 slots), accessible anytime. If full, excess items drop normally.

System Messages

Chat messages styled after Solo Leveling's system windows notify you of level ups, rank changes, title unlocks, shadow extractions, critical hits, backstabs, and ability activations.

Keybinds (all configurable)

R — Dash | J — Toggle HUD | K — Stats Menu | L — Loot Inventory | G — Summon Shadows (ARISE) | H — Store Shadows | V — Mana Shield | B — Shadow Shop | C — Stealth
